current_life_events: Got into a fight with her parents over her grades and future college plans; a classmate posted a hurtful comment on social media about her weight; struggling to meet the deadline for her graphic novel assignment.
mental_state: Feeling trapped and judged by everyone around her; doubting her self-worth and creative abilities.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The fight with her parents and the hurtful social media comment triggered body image concerns and conflicts with parents, while the looming deadline and fear of judgment are exacerbating loneliness and procrastination.
